title: Ratio and Proportion

title: Numbers and their Operations
description: Standard form (A × 10ⁿ), positive/negative/fractional indices, laws of indices.

title: Functions and Graphs

title: Equations and Inequalities

title: Set Language and Notation

title: Matrices

title: Congruence and Similarity

description: Symmetry properties of circles, angle properties — angle at centre, angles in same segment, tangent-radius.

title: Pythagoras' Theorem and Trigonometry

title: Mensuration
description: Arc length, sector area, area of segment, radian measure, conversion between radians and degrees.

subject: A Math
